AI Product Engineer

Join a team building production AI tools for developers.

What you'll do

  • Build Python backend services
  • Work with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker
  • Improve data pipelines and LLM workflows

What we look for

  • Strong Python background
  • Experience with SQLAlchemy and Alembic
  • Interest in prompt engineering and RAG
